detail: Initialize Vite with TypeScript template. Install and configure vite-plugin-pwa in generateSW mode. Set up src/ directory structure. Create index.html with basic skeleton and required meta tags (viewport, theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style). Ensure build outputs to dist/ and service worker is auto-generated.
passing_requirement: vite build succeeds with zero errors
vite-plugin-pwa injects service worker into build output
index.html contains all required PWA meta tags

detail: Create manifest.json with name, short_name, start_url, display standalone, background_color #ffffff, theme_color #ffffff, and icon references (192x192, 512x512, maskable). Generate simple colored-square placeholder icons (red/blue pattern) or create via data URI / SVG. Add apple-touch-icon link in index.html. Ensure icons are referenced in Vite config for precaching.
passing_requirement: manifest.json is valid and linked in index.html
icon files exist and are referenced correctly
Lighthouse PWA audit shows manifest and icons pass

detail: Create src/packs/pack1.ts through pack5.ts. Each exports a WordPack object with id, name, and exactly 100 words (string[]). Create src/packs/index.ts that exports all 5 packs and a getActiveWords(packIds: string[]) function that merges selected packs, deduplicates case-insensitively (keep first-cased form), and returns the unique word pool. Ensure no duplicate words exist across the 500 total words.
passing_requirement: Each pack contains exactly 100 words
No duplicates exist within or across all 5 packs
getActiveWords correctly deduplicates case-insensitively
getActiveWords returns empty array when no packs selected

task: Define types and implement Mulberry32 PRNG
detail: Create src/types.ts with CardColor, WordPack, Cell, Board, ViewMode interfaces. Create src/prng.ts with mulberry32(seed: string) function using FNV-1a-style seed mixing: init n=0x811c9dc5, loop seed chars with Math.imul(n ^ charCode, 16777619). Return function that produces [0,1) floats. Test deterministic: same seed always produces same sequence.
passing_requirement: Same seed produces identical number sequence
Different seeds produce different sequences
ab
ba
Distribution roughly uniform across 10000 samples

detail: Create src/generator.ts with generateBoard(config) function. Flow: (1) get word pool from active packs, (2) if pool < 25 words throw error, (3) create two PRNGs: mulberry32(seed + ':words') and mulberry32(seed + ':colors'), (4) Fisher-Yates shuffle pool with rngWords, pick first 25, (5) build color array [9 firstTeam, 8 secondTeam, 7 neutral, 1 assassin], (6) Fisher-Yates shuffle colors with rngColors, (7) zip into 25 Cell objects. Return Board with seed, firstTeam, cells. First team chosen randomly when config says 'random'.
passing_requirement: Generated board always has exactly 25 cells
No duplicate words in any generated board
Color distribution is exactly 9/8/7/1
Same seed + packs produces identical board
Throws clear error when active packs < 25 unique words

detail: Create src/url.ts with encodeBoard(board, viewMode, activePackIds) and decodeBoard(hash) functions. Encode format: seed|packIdsCommaSeparated|firstTeam|viewMode. Use btoa(encodeURIComponent(str)) with base64url-safe replace (+→-, /→_, trim =). Decode reverses: restore padding, replace back, atob, decodeURIComponent, split by |. On page load, detect hash and attempt decode. Invalid hash → silent ignore, generate new random board. Also export copyToClipboard helper with fallback (select text + prompt).
passing_requirement: Encode then decode produces identical values
Decoded hash regenerates identical board
Invalid hash is silently ignored without crashing
Clipboard fallback works when navigator.clipboard unavailable

detail: Create styles.css at project root with mobile-first design. Board: CSS Grid 5 columns, gap 8px, 100% width, max-width 500px, centered. Cards: aspect-ratio 3/2, flex center, font-size clamp(10px, 3.5vw, 16px), padding 4px, text-align center, border-radius 4px, overflow-wrap break-word. Touch targets: buttons/checkboxes minimum 44x44px. Toggle switch: 48px height. Card colors in spymaster mode: .card.red, .card.blue, .card.neutral, .card.assassin with appropriate colors. Operative mode: all cards beige/cream. Layout: header, controls row, board, footer stacked vertically. No animations beyond CSS transitions.
passing_requirement: 5x5 grid renders correctly at 320px width
5x5 grid renders correctly at 500px+ width
All touch targets are ≥ 44x44px
Toggle switch is visually clear and 48px tall
Text fits within cards without overflow on mobile

detail: Create src/ui.ts with render functions: renderBoard(board, viewMode) creates/updates DOM grid, apply card colors only in spymaster mode, operative shows beige. Create src/state.ts with module-level state: currentBoard, viewMode, activePackIds (Set with all 5 packs default). Expose getState, setBoard, setViewMode, toggleViewMode, togglePack, setActivePacks. UI components: header with title, generate button, share button; controls row with 5 pack checkboxes + view toggle; board grid; footer showing current seed. Share button triggers encode + clipboard copy + toast notification.
passing_requirement: Board renders 25 cards in 5x5 grid
Operative mode shows all cards beige
Spymaster mode shows correct colors per cell
Pack checkboxes reflect activePackIds state
View toggle reflects current viewMode
Seed display updates on generate

detail: Create src/main.ts that initializes everything on DOMContentLoaded. Event handlers: (1) Generate button → new random seed, regenerate board, update URL hash, render. (2) Share button → encode current state to hash, copy URL to clipboard, show toast. (3) View toggle → toggleViewMode, re-render board colors. (4) Pack checkbox change → update activePackIds, regenerate board with same seed, re-render. (5) Hashchange event → decode hash, regenerate board, set viewMode, re-render. (6) Window load → check for hash, if none generate new random board.
passing_requirement: Generate button creates new random board
Share button copies URL that reproduces board when pasted
View toggle instantly switches card colors without regenerating
Pack checkbox change regenerates board
Page load with hash restores exact board and view mode
Page load without hash generates new random board

detail: Build project with vite build. Serve dist/ locally (npx serve dist or python http.server). Open in browser, verify board generates. Disable network (DevTools → Network → Offline). Refresh page. App should load instantly from cache. Generate new board — should work. Toggle view mode — should work. Verify service worker is registered and caching. Test on mobile viewport sizes in DevTools. Verify no console errors in offline mode.
passing_requirement: App loads successfully with network disabled
Board generation works offline
View toggle works offline
No console errors in offline mode
Service Worker is registered and controlling page
